sections.h2: What Is a YouTube to MP4 Converter?
p: A YouTube to MP4 converter is an online tool that allows users to download YouTube videos and save them in MP4 format.
Many users search for youtube to mp4, download youtube video mp4, or youtube mp4 downloader when they want to watch videos offline.
Y2mate provides a fast and simple way to convert YouTube videos into MP4 without installing software or extensions.
If you need audio instead of video, you can use our YouTube to MP3 Converter to extract audio easily.

sections.h2: How to Download YouTube Videos to MP4
p: Downloading YouTube videos in MP4 format is simple and requires only a few steps.
If you are searching for youtube video downloader online or convert youtube to mp4, follow the steps below.
Open YouTube and copy the link of the video you want to download.
Paste the copied URL into the input box at the top of this page.
Select MP4 as your preferred video format and choose quality like HD, 1080p, or 4K.
Click the convert button and download your MP4 file instantly.
